agent_orchestration_config.description: Configuration that indicates whether profiling is enabled for the agent.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the profiling group.

compute_platform.description: The compute platform on which the profiling group is running, such as AWS Lambda or EC2.

created_at.description: The date and time when the profiling group was created.

id.description: The identifier of the profiling group.

profiling_status.description: The current profiling status, including details about the latest agent orchestration and aggregated profiles.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the profiling group.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the profiling group was last updated.
